channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th May
item.description:

item.title: Flood light adjacent to court area in coopers edge public area space 1 is smashed, 29th May
item.description:
Flood light adjacent to court area in coopers edge public area space 1 is smashed. there is glass all over the floor

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury

item.title: Damage to speed bump, 29th May
item.description:
No exact category available, but there is damage to the speed bump just after the railway bridge, on the side of the road heading towards Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13a, Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 29th May
item.description:
PERM - Please can a inquiry ref be raised for a Perm Repair for further investigation for North Area. Please can you copy in Kim Ward upon your response. Details are as follows: Previous Job Number: 43120342 Address: Suffolk Square, junction with Suffolk Road, Cheltenham USRN: 6701100 Job Description: Section of Pole made safe – Requires further investigation for potential perm repair. Photo:
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 29th May
item.description:
Replace post and Traffic lights warning/50mph repeater signs Road Closure ///withdraw.bloomers.request
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Drain cover in road is loose therefore creating loud bang every time a vehicle drivers over/on it., 29th May
item.description:
Nearside of Swindon Road near junction of Windyridge Road Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 404, Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 29th May
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cavity in road, 29th May
item.description:
Outside number 31. In middle of road. There is a cavity in the road. The opening is currently small but you can see inside and it goes down wide and deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Croft Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fire, 29th May
item.description:
Someone has lit a fire on open space. Burnt debris left behind

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)
